location: On a corpse behind (east of) the giant Land Octopus atop the canopy in Ruin-Strewn Precipice, Liurnia of the Lakes, shortly before the Overlook Site of Grace.

source.name: corpse pickup, Ruin-Strewn Precipice (behind the Land Octopus)

tactics: Enter Ruin-Strewn Precipice from the Ravine-Veiled Village area (an alternate route up to the Altus Plateau that bypasses the Grand Lift of Dectus)
From the Ruin-Strewn Precipice grace, take the elevator down, continue forward, and climb the ladder up to a rooftop/canopy area
A Giant Land Octopus sits on this ledge — its grab attacks hit hard and can combo, but you don't have to kill it; you can circle around and loot the corpse behind it
This dungeon's Overlook grace comes right after this point, just before the Magma Wyrm Makar boss room
lore: Modeled after an ancient serpent deity, this blade once served a since-forgotten faith practiced on Mt. Gelmir that used it in sacrificial rites — some of that old power lingers, restoring a sliver of the wielder's health with every kill.

builds.name: Strength-leaning sustain build
builds.why: Its passive heal-on-kill effect (a flat amount plus a percentage of max HP) rewards an aggressive, kill-chaining playstyle in both PvE clears and invasions.
